articles.title: US military says it has launched new strikes on southern Iran
articles.description: The strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats were taken in "self-defence", US Central Command says.

articles.title: Hottest May day on record in UK as temperatures pass 34C
articles.description: It comes after the UK recorded its warmest May night on Sunday when temperatures reached 19.4C.

articles.title: Social media as bad for young people as smoking, top doctors say
articles.description: The Academy of Medical Royal Colleges says doctors should routinely check on screen time and social media use when seeing younger patients.

articles.title: Next boss warns of 'dramatic' fall in entry-level jobs
articles.description: Lord Wolfson tells the BBC Next now typically receives double the number of applicants for one role than it did two years ago.
